description: At the end of a shift, a front desk agent needs to reconcile their cash drawer.

nodes.task_description: Run a report from the PMS showing all cash transactions processed during the shift.

expected_outcome.value: The report shows total cash receipts of $500.

nodes.task_description: Physically count the cash in the drawer.
Compare the physical count to the system report and document any variance.

expected_outcome.value: The agent documents a $5 'overage' on the reconciliation form.
